name: Siltana - Building Operations Platform (50+ Year Lifecycle)
description: Bridges construction to 50+ year building operations lifecycle, providing RaaS (Robotics as a Service), HaaS (Hardware as a Service), and IoT-driven facility management. Transforms building operations from reactive maintenance to predictive, data-driven facilities management with robotics, IoT sensors, and real-time analytics.

after.robotics: Autonomous robot fleet with UWB positioning and task scheduling
after.maintenance: Predictive maintenance with EFAS eigenmode forecasting
after.buildingHistory: 50+ year unified building history with voxel-level tracking

value.positioningAccuracy: +/-10 cm indoor UWB tracking at 10 Hz
value.maintenanceOptimization: Predictive scheduling based on equipment degradation models

milestones.name: Robot Fleet Foundation
milestones.description: Robot registry schema, 3D positioning with UWB, battery monitoring, fleet coordination algorithms

milestones.name: IoT Sensor Network
milestones.description: Sensor deployment plans, TimescaleDB integration, real-time alerting, Grafana dashboards

milestones.name: Commissioning & Turnover
milestones.description: Commissioning test workflows, deficiency tracking, O&M manual generation, warranty tracking

milestones.name: Predictive Maintenance
milestones.description: EFAS equipment degradation models, automated work orders, vendor dispatch, 50-year lifecycle analytics
